# Zanna Option Runtime Reference

[Back to the runtime reference index](README.md)

## Classes

<a id="zanna-option"></a>
### `Zanna.Option`

Represents an optional value that may be present or absent.

`Zanna.Option` exposes a registry-backed runtime surface without requiring callers to construct
the class directly. Its public surface exposes properties such as `IsSome`, `IsNone` and
operations including `Some`, `SomeStr`, `SomeI64`, `SomeI1`.

#### Properties

| Property | Type | Access |
|---|---|---|
| <a id="zanna-option-issome"></a>`IsSome` | `i1` | read-only |
| <a id="zanna-option-isnone"></a>`IsNone` | `i1` | read-only |
